name: Assets Technician Offboarding Sequence
description: Complete assets recovery and offboarding sequence for departing technicians

steps.title: Complete Equipment Inventory
steps.description: Inventory all assigned equipment and assets

substeps.title: Inventory all mobile devices
substeps.description: Account for all company mobile devices, tablets, and communication equipment

substeps.title: Inventory uniforms and safety gear
substeps.description: Account for all company uniforms, safety equipment, and branded items

substeps.title: Inventory tools and specialized equipment
substeps.description: Account for all company tools, diagnostic equipment, and specialized assets

steps.title: Asset Recovery Coordination
steps.description: Coordinate return of all company assets

substeps.title: Schedule equipment return
substeps.description: Arrange for return of all company equipment and assets

substeps.title: Process asset condition assessment
substeps.description: Assess condition of returned assets and document any damage or wear

substeps.title: Update asset tracking system
substeps.description: Update internal asset tracking with returned items and their status

steps.title: Final Asset Reconciliation
steps.description: Complete final reconciliation of all assets

substeps.title: Generate final asset reconciliation report
substeps.description: Create comprehensive report of all recovered and outstanding assets
